name_en: Original Fendi Vertigo Summer Capsule Limited Series
name_cn:
Original Fendi Vertigo Summer Capsule Limited Series
The latest Baguette handbag. The classic full-letter double F looks like a fisheye lens shot, full of personality, bold and innovative, and full of fun, feeling full of energy 💪💪
Size 26x13x6cm 3D Color Embroidery 0159
